tariff_system: Turkish Customs Tariff (GTİP - Gümrük Tarife İstatistik Pozisyonu)

gtip_definition.description: Turkish 12-digit tariff nomenclature system used for customs classification, duty determination, and statistical reporting

general_directorate_of_customs.name: General Directorate of Customs (Gümrük Müşteşarlığı - GGM)

tariff_tr_com.name: Tariff-TR.com
tariff_tr_com.note: Provides 2026 customs tariff data for subscribers
tariff_tr_com.data_basis: Eight-digit HS codes based on EU Customs Tariff Nomenclature

method_1.name: Direct Government Database
method_1.process: Access Data Bank section, select Tariff Nomenclature, download by position

method_2.name: Online Search Engine
method_2.description: Query by GTIP code or product description

code_count.note: Exact count not specified in available sources

important_notes: First 6 digits are international HS codes
7-8 digits are EU Combined Nomenclature codes
9-10 digits are Turkey-specific for different tax treatments
11-12 digits are purely for statistical purposes
Different from GCC member countries despite similar 12-digit structure
EU Member State Customs Tariff Nomenclature (TARIC) system applies
Eight-digit HS codes from Tariff-TR must be used with caution outside EU customs territory

bulk_download_status.government_portal: Individual code downloads available; full database bulk download not mentioned
bulk_download_status.commercial_sources: Tariff-TR.com offers downloadable reports for subscribers
bulk_download_status.recommendation: Contact GGM directly for bulk data export requests

limitations: No direct CSV/Excel bulk download from official government sources in search results
Position-by-position download may be tedious for complete database
Tariff-TR.com is third-party and requires subscription for 2026 data
Dynamic database means continuous updates throughout the year
Some detailed rate information may require customs authority contact
